description: Maersk is a logistics and shipping company. Its digital services include developer-accessible APIs for shipment, booking, schedules, and related supply-chain integrations.
summary: Maersk exposes a developer HTTP API platform at `https://api.maersk.com` via its Developer Portal, plus a public MCP server at `https://captainpeter-gptapp.centralus.prod.maersk.io/mcp`; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
